CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION BETWEEN PARTIES, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS;-JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS. DEFTS. TO PAY PLAINTIFF RENT OF $3,301.71 BY 7/31/04, AFTER CHECK CLEARS, PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES STIPULATE TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AGAINST DEFT. CASSANDRA LONG ON 7/19/04. DEFTS TO PAY $1095.57 EACH MONTH STARTING 8/1/04. DEFTS NOT TO HAVE ANY CO-TENANTS. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTY FEES AND COSTS. ALL AGREE TO THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION.
